generic_rules: Focus repairs on resolving AGREE syntax errors before attempting semantic fixes.
Prioritize repairs that address unresolved identifiers or type mismatches.
Use only visible AADL features or locally declared helpers in AGREE expressions.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts reside within `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Ensure correct scalar type declarations: `int`, `real`, or `bool`.
Helper declarations must match the expected type of the expression.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce unqualified package references or missing dependencies.
Avoid modifying architecture to resolve AGREE errors; focus on contract adjustments.
Do not attempt semantic repairs if syntax errors are present.
